I'll start by warming up - fetching the latest from main and checking the current state of the repository.

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main --no-edit
```

```
From github.com:travisjneuman/system.knowledgebase
 * branch            main       -> FETCH_HEAD
Already up to date.
```

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git log -3 --oneline
```

```
7a43b20 refactor: extract components from Settings and CardDetailPanel (Phase 2A/B)
ded985c fix: resolve Cloudflare build failure for Rollup optional dependencies
4e327d5 docs: comprehensive documentation audit and cleanup
```

Let me check for any outstanding tasks:

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && ls tasks/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No task files found"
```

```
tasks/master-implementation-status.md
```

Good - the repository is up to date and there's just the master implementation status file. I'm ready to help. What would you like to work on?
